steps.name: sync
steps.run:
if [ -z "${SCHALTWERK_AUTH_TOKEN:-}" ]; then
  echo "SCHALTWERK_AUTH_TOKEN is required to fetch from Schaltwerk"
  exit 1
fi
if [ -z "${GITHUB_TOKEN:-}" ]; then
  echo "GITHUB_TOKEN is required to push to GitHub"
  exit 1
fi

git config --global credential.helper store
printf 'https://x:%s@schaltwerk.dev\n' "$SCHALTWERK_AUTH_TOKEN" > "$HOME/.git-credentials"
printf 'https://x:%s@github.com\n' "$GITHUB_TOKEN" >> "$HOME/.git-credentials"
git remote set-url origin "https://schaltwerk.dev/git/go-sqlite.git"
git remote remove github 2>/dev/null || true
git remote add github "https://github.com/dnl-fm/go-sqlite.git"

git fetch origin '+refs/heads/*:refs/remotes/origin/*' '+refs/tags/*:refs/tags/*'
git for-each-ref --format='%(refname:strip=3)' refs/remotes/origin | while read -r branch; do
  if [ "$branch" = "HEAD" ]; then
    continue
  fi
  git push github "+refs/remotes/origin/$branch:refs/heads/$branch"
done
git push --prune github '+refs/tags/*:refs/tags/*'
